item.title: Repost• @idakvetny Come by @nikolajkunsthal 2morrow at 4.pm for @radarcontempora...
item.description:
🎬 Video

@the_danish_nft_community

Repost• @idakvetny Come by @nikolajkunsthal 2morrow at 4.pm for @radarcontemporary’s event NFT COPENHAGEN
We have a have a historic POAP ready for you and will drop 5 CryptoPong balls live after the event.
@crypto.pong
_______________________________

Radar Contemporary & Nikolaj Kunsthal are proud to present one of the first big art institutions in Scandinavia to show an exhibition that sheds light on the phenomenon of NFT art.

CryptoPong is a group exhibition with a strong team of Danish and international
artists who have in common that they are in different ways pioneers in the field of VR, AR, 3D and NFT.

In connection with the CryptoPong exhibition at Nikolaj Kunsthal Radar Contemporary has arranged an event NFT COPENHAGEN which sheds light on the NFT phenomenon. Five leading figures from the art world take part in a conversation about their experiences with NFT art and future possibilities?
Read more here:
Event link
https://fb.me/e/3IUUFLajz

The event is supportet by @statenskunstfond

This POAP is a historic proof of appearance.
______________________
Proof of Attendance Protocol (POAP) is a protocol that creates digital badges or collectibles through the use of blockchain technology. While the acronym derives from the protocol name, POAP is also used to describe the collectibles themselves.
POAPs are minted through smart contracts as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) on the Ethereum blockchain. They are ERC-721 tokens created to celebrate and record the attendance of an event.

#nft #copenhagen #event #arttalk #artpanel #blockchain #poap #fomo #physical #digital #appearance #tezos

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🎬 Video

@the_danish_nft_community

Repost• @idakvetny Come by @nikolajkunsthal 2morrow at 4.pm for @radarcontemporary’s event NFT COPENHAGEN
We have a have a historic POAP ready for you and will drop 5 CryptoPong balls live after the event.
@crypto.pong
_______________________________

Radar Contemporary & Nikolaj Kunsthal are proud to present one of the first big art institutions in Scandinavia to show an exhibition that sheds light on the phenomenon of NFT art.

CryptoPong is a group exhibition with a strong team of Danish and international
artists who have in common that they are in different ways pioneers in the field of VR, AR, 3D and NFT.

In connection with the CryptoPong exhibition at Nikolaj Kunsthal Radar Contemporary has arranged an event NFT COPENHAGEN which sheds light on the NFT phenomenon. Five leading figures from the art world take part in a conversation about their experiences with NFT art and future possibilities?
Read more here:
Event link
https://fb.me/e/3IUUFLajz

The event is supportet by @statenskunstfond

This POAP is a historic proof of appearance.
______________________
Proof of Attendance Protocol (POAP) is a protocol that creates digital badges or collectibles through the use of blockchain technology. While the acronym derives from the protocol name, POAP is also used to describe the collectibles themselves.
POAPs are minted through smart contracts as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) on the Ethereum blockchain. They are ERC-721 tokens created to celebrate and record the attendance of an event.

#nft #copenhagen #event #arttalk #artpanel #blockchain #poap #fomo #physical #digital #appearance #tezos

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.author: the_danish_nft_community

item.title: Repost• @radarcontemporary NFT COPENHAGEN (panel talk in Danish) https://faceboo...
item.description:
@the_danish_nft_community

Repost• @radarcontemporary

NFT COPENHAGEN (panel talk in Danish)

https://facebook.com/events/s/nft-copenhagen-hvad-skal-vi-me/628737708722590/

NFT som akronym for ‘non-fungible token’/en ikke ombyttelig genstand, har de seneste år været på manges læber, når talen falder på fremtidens digitale infrastrukturer og ny digital kunst. Den internationale kunstscene mærker fundamentet forskyde sig og nye generationer kommer på banen med decentrale løsninger. Blockchain-teknologien tænkes ind i nye sammenhænge, som den traditionelle kunstverden.

Vi har inviteret fem toneangivne personer fra kunstverdenen til en samtale om deres erfaringer med NFT-kunst og hvilke fremtidige muligheder de ser foran sig?

Paneldetagerne er:
* Christian Andersen - gallerist Christian Andersen og medstifter af Juneart.io, den første nordiske NFT platform i samarbejde med Esperanza Rosales of VI, VII i Oslo

* Jarl Rosenlykke - samler, rådgiver, Krypto-NFT kunstner og medstifter af Magine

* Stina Gustafsson - kurator og kunst strategist indenfor blockchain og Web3 samt medstifter af kunstafdeling af Department of Decentralization

* Jonas Kasper Jensen - kunstner og medlem af European Blockchain Center

* Ida Kvetny - VR/AR hybridkunstner og medstifter af Radar Contemporary

Samtalen bliver modereret af Diana Velasco, medstifter af Radar Contemporary, kunstnerisk leder af Museum of Nordic Digital Art (MoNDA) og kunstner.

Arrangementet bliver afholdt i Nikolaj Kunsthals Øvre Galleri, hvor udstillingen CryptoPong kurateret af Radar Contemporary om NFT-fænomenet også vises.
Der vil være mulighed for at købe vin i den nye foyer og møde andre NFT-interesserede inden og efter arrangementet. Efter arrangementet vil der være mulighed for at fortsætte snakken i foyeren. Nikolaj Kunsthal lukker kl. 18.00.
Fri entré.
Arrangementet er støttet af Statens Kunstfond.

@nikolajkunsthal #nikolajkunsthal @statenskunstfond @radarcontemporary #radarcontemporary @crypto.pong @christian_andersen_ @rosenlykke @stinagustafsson @jonaskasperjensen @idakvetny @_dianavelasco_ #museum #artgallery #kunsthal #nft #cryptoart #artinstallation #talk #nftfuture #artandtech @juneart.io #ar #ai #gantechnology #metaverse
item.content:encoded:
@the_danish_nft_community

Repost• @radarcontemporary

NFT COPENHAGEN (panel talk in Danish)

https://facebook.com/events/s/nft-copenhagen-hvad-skal-vi-me/628737708722590/

NFT som akronym for ‘non-fungible token’/en ikke ombyttelig genstand, har de seneste år været på manges læber, når talen falder på fremtidens digitale infrastrukturer og ny digital kunst. Den internationale kunstscene mærker fundamentet forskyde sig og nye generationer kommer på banen med decentrale løsninger. Blockchain-teknologien tænkes ind i nye sammenhænge, som den traditionelle kunstverden.

Vi har inviteret fem toneangivne personer fra kunstverdenen til en samtale om deres erfaringer med NFT-kunst og hvilke fremtidige muligheder de ser foran sig?

Paneldetagerne er:
* Christian Andersen - gallerist Christian Andersen og medstifter af Juneart.io, den første nordiske NFT platform i samarbejde med Esperanza Rosales of VI, VII i Oslo

* Jarl Rosenlykke - samler, rådgiver, Krypto-NFT kunstner og medstifter af Magine

* Stina Gustafsson - kurator og kunst strategist indenfor blockchain og Web3 samt medstifter af kunstafdeling af Department of Decentralization

* Jonas Kasper Jensen - kunstner og medlem af European Blockchain Center

* Ida Kvetny - VR/AR hybridkunstner og medstifter af Radar Contemporary

Samtalen bliver modereret af Diana Velasco, medstifter af Radar Contemporary, kunstnerisk leder af Museum of Nordic Digital Art (MoNDA) og kunstner.

Arrangementet bliver afholdt i Nikolaj Kunsthals Øvre Galleri, hvor udstillingen CryptoPong kurateret af Radar Contemporary om NFT-fænomenet også vises.
Der vil være mulighed for at købe vin i den nye foyer og møde andre NFT-interesserede inden og efter arrangementet. Efter arrangementet vil der være mulighed for at fortsætte snakken i foyeren. Nikolaj Kunsthal lukker kl. 18.00.
Fri entré.
Arrangementet er støttet af Statens Kunstfond.

@nikolajkunsthal #nikolajkunsthal @statenskunstfond @radarcontemporary #radarcontemporary @crypto.pong @christian_andersen_ @rosenlykke @stinagustafsson @jonaskasperjensen @idakvetny @_dianavelasco_ #museum #artgallery #kunsthal #nft #cryptoart #artinstallation #talk #nftfuture #artandtech @juneart.io #ar #ai #gantechnology #metaverse
item.author: the_danish_nft_community

item.title: “Pixelating the Contemporary Art World: An Institutional Perspective on Non-Fung...
item.description:
@the_danish_nft_community

“Pixelating the Contemporary Art World: An Institutional Perspective on Non-Fungible Tokens and Actors of the Contemporary Art World” by Csongor Szabo & Lasse Kriegel Skovrup.

Very interesting new paper written in Denmark on the basis of primarily Danish interviews from the field of art and crypto.
item.content:encoded:
@the_danish_nft_community

“Pixelating the Contemporary Art World: An Institutional Perspective on Non-Fungible Tokens and Actors of the Contemporary Art World” by Csongor Szabo & Lasse Kriegel Skovrup.

Very interesting new paper written in Denmark on the basis of primarily Danish interviews from the field of art and crypto.
item.author: the_danish_nft_community

item.title: This Thursday at 15 @billedkunstnernesforbund are holding a panel with @c_art_te...
item.description:
@the_danish_nft_community

This Thursday at 15 @billedkunstnernesforbund are holding a panel with @c_art_tech’s @majken–overgaard, @larsworn and @ditte_ejlerskov at @kulturmoedet where crypto culture is on the agenda.

@ditte_ejlerskov writes that they in their discussion will consider the the crypto movement as part of “a compelling philosophical undertaking for the future of humanity altogether ignored by mainstream media who simply repeatedly present the cryptoverse as yet another animal jpeg sold for millions at auction.

Furthermore, the mainstream assumption that all NFT- and cryptocurrency-enthusiasts are motivated by a libertarian political agenda is very wrong. Oppositely in fact, all previous significant computing or coding movements–like the current blockchain transition–were initiated and adopted firstly by ideologically motivated people who belonged to the anti-authoritarianistic counterculture of their time.

The original promise of the world wide web was to share our resources. In the 1990s Macintosh’s slogan was inspired by the 1960s counter culture concept of “power to the people" and the Macintosh machine was branded solemnly as a tool for free spirits. Later, open source software and file sharing was invented along with collaborative systems like Wikipedia which intended to democratize information.

Years later commercialization of these ideas were set in motion with Web2–and ironically supported by the Macintosh/Apple giant. Today Big Tech is buying up competition and killing new thoughts emerging. Until now. The blockchain tech cannot be killed. And it cannot be swallowed.

For decades the idea of the internet has thus been stuck between the powers of capitalism and the powers of centralization. Global internet governance is now finally rising in a manner that focuses on empathy and not pure capitalism–an empathy industry or renaissance of the Web1 idea of community. “ 

#crypto
#cryptoverse
#cryptoculture
#counter-culture
#cryptocurrency  #cryptocollectibles
#cryptofeminism
#cryptoart
#womenofcrypto
#nftwomen
#womennftartist
#digitallynative
#nft
#nftart  #blockchain
#decentralisation
#defi
#thereset
#thegreatreset
#kulturmødet
item.content:encoded:
@the_danish_nft_community

This Thursday at 15 @billedkunstnernesforbund are holding a panel with @c_art_tech’s @majken–overgaard, @larsworn and @ditte_ejlerskov at @kulturmoedet where crypto culture is on the agenda.

@ditte_ejlerskov writes that they in their discussion will consider the the crypto movement as part of “a compelling philosophical undertaking for the future of humanity altogether ignored by mainstream media who simply repeatedly present the cryptoverse as yet another animal jpeg sold for millions at auction.

Furthermore, the mainstream assumption that all NFT- and cryptocurrency-enthusiasts are motivated by a libertarian political agenda is very wrong. Oppositely in fact, all previous significant computing or coding movements–like the current blockchain transition–were initiated and adopted firstly by ideologically motivated people who belonged to the anti-authoritarianistic counterculture of their time.

The original promise of the world wide web was to share our resources. In the 1990s Macintosh’s slogan was inspired by the 1960s counter culture concept of “power to the people" and the Macintosh machine was branded solemnly as a tool for free spirits. Later, open source software and file sharing was invented along with collaborative systems like Wikipedia which intended to democratize information.

Years later commercialization of these ideas were set in motion with Web2–and ironically supported by the Macintosh/Apple giant. Today Big Tech is buying up competition and killing new thoughts emerging. Until now. The blockchain tech cannot be killed. And it cannot be swallowed.

For decades the idea of the internet has thus been stuck between the powers of capitalism and the powers of centralization. Global internet governance is now finally rising in a manner that focuses on empathy and not pure capitalism–an empathy industry or renaissance of the Web1 idea of community. “ 

#crypto
#cryptoverse
#cryptoculture
#counter-culture
#cryptocurrency  #cryptocollectibles
#cryptofeminism
#cryptoart
#womenofcrypto
#nftwomen
#womennftartist
#digitallynative
#nft
#nftart  #blockchain
#decentralisation
#defi
#thereset
#thegreatreset
#kulturmødet
item.author: the_danish_nft_community

item.title: Right Now Danish artist @idakvetny 🇩🇰💧⛓🔥 Repost• @lumen_prize We are delighted t...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (4 medier)

@the_danish_nft_community

Right Now Danish artist @idakvetny 🇩🇰💧⛓🔥
Repost• @lumen_prize We are delighted to announce the drop of @idakvetny’s Schelling on @knownorigin.io__ , the first 1/1 dropping in the GPS_Genesis Collection!

Celebrating the global nature of the Lumen community and exploring the liminal space between physical and digital worlds, GPS_Genesis invites collectors on a journey through cyberspace and beyond with the opportunity to collect an original NFT and a geo-cache stashed somewhere around the globe…

Kvetny’s “Schelling” is a film clip of animated digital sculpture made in VR. The work is an homage to philosopher Schelling’s perception of the universe as one big organism. The 3D animated sculpture represents a subconscious cosmography where the body dissolved and a hallucinogenic is present. First shown in Extensions vol I @radarcontemporary.

👉 Visit link https://knownorigin.io/collections/lumen-prize/gps-genesis 👈

#nft #knownorigin #digitalart #nftartist #nftart #geocache #geocaching

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (4 medier)

@the_danish_nft_community

Right Now Danish artist @idakvetny 🇩🇰💧⛓🔥
Repost• @lumen_prize We are delighted to announce the drop of @idakvetny’s Schelling on @knownorigin.io__ , the first 1/1 dropping in the GPS_Genesis Collection!

Celebrating the global nature of the Lumen community and exploring the liminal space between physical and digital worlds, GPS_Genesis invites collectors on a journey through cyberspace and beyond with the opportunity to collect an original NFT and a geo-cache stashed somewhere around the globe…

Kvetny’s “Schelling” is a film clip of animated digital sculpture made in VR. The work is an homage to philosopher Schelling’s perception of the universe as one big organism. The 3D animated sculpture represents a subconscious cosmography where the body dissolved and a hallucinogenic is present. First shown in Extensions vol I @radarcontemporary.

👉 Visit link https://knownorigin.io/collections/lumen-prize/gps-genesis 👈

#nft #knownorigin #digitalart #nftartist #nftart #geocache #geocaching

Se slideshow på Instagram
